ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the expense was incurred */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department incurring the expense */,
  "cost_element_id" INTEGER /* Cost element associated with the expense */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country where the expense was incurred */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the expense */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency of the expense */,
  "converted_cost" REAL /* Converted cost in a standard currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project associated with the expense */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Vendor or supplier associated with the expense */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for external expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_cost_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_element_id") REFERENCES cost_elements ("cost_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's function */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_elements" (
  "cost_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost element */,
  "cost_element_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost element */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cost element (e.g., Labor, Equipment) */,
  "is_billable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cost element is billable to clients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate against a standard currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department managing the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was received */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Vendor who issued the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
